aweme_list.desc: First time buyers during the home buying process be like… 😅 If you’re feeling confused, stressed or unsure what’s happening next — that’s completely normal. The home buying journey can feel overwhelming, but you don’t have to figure it out alone. If you need help understanding: • The stages of buying • The costs involved • How to get an Agreement in Principle • What happens after your offer is accepted 📩 DM me — I’m happy to help.#FirstTimeBuyer #Mortgage #Kent

aweme_list.desc: Santander have just announced a 98% mortgage product for First-Time Buyers!🚨 This goes to show that lenders are actively trying to fix the pain point of understanding that it’s hard to save for a deposit right now. It’s important to know that your options aren’t as limited as you might think and there are products out there that could work for you! 💭 Please note this is for illustration purposes & may vary depending on your situation. Typically we charge a fee for arranging a mortgage, however the actual fee will be dependent on your circumstances.  Your home may be repossessed if you do not keep up repayments on your mortgage. #mortgagetips #property #firsttimehomeowner #firsttimebuyer #MetamortgagesUK
